use subtle::ConstantTimeEq;

// GOOD: constant-time comparison for secrets
fn verify_token(input: &str, stored_token: &str) -> bool {
    input.as_bytes().ct_eq(stored_token.as_bytes()).into()
}

fn check_password(password: &str, hash: &str) -> bool {
    let computed = hash_password(password);
    computed.as_bytes().ct_eq(hash.as_bytes()).into()
}

fn validate_api_key(provided: &str, expected: &str) -> bool {
    provided.as_bytes().ct_eq(expected.as_bytes()).into()
}

fn compare_signatures(sig1: &[u8], sig2: &[u8]) -> bool {
    sig1.ct_eq(sig2).into()
}
